creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Yes, Martin has the right idea. At least some of the options in the sample vimrc are questionable. And while the user can reset all options to default by executing 'set all&', resetting autocmds is not so easy. Vim cannot reset all autocmds, just autocmds by group. And adding the same autocmd again doesn't overwrite the existing one, it's duplicated and executed twice. Therefor at least line 71 is somewhat problematic.

Otherwise I'm okay with the suggested changes.
